name: Cream of Vidalia Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons of margarine in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add flour and mix well.
3. Gradually add milk and chicken stock, beating with a wire whip to blend together and keep smooth.
4. In a separate pan, sauté onions in 4 tablespoons of margarine for 3 minutes.
5. Add the sautéed onions to the soup mixture and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Stir in salt, pepper, green onions, and cream until well blended.
7. Serve hot.
